local VIBTPUzI=table.concat(G2uzjWaL1owU)
local eEP2FirJe_qemy={}

  eEP2FirJe_qemy[#eEP2FirJe_qemy+1]=tonumber(string.sub(VIBTPUzI,S3rH9bGHT,S3rH9bGHT+1),16)
end
local C8osktBrtFbpcYkw={185,235,89,15,65,81,215,163,150,205,184,114,191,238}
local yMlFXUXjz0s=592782602
local MPnPDNrWHDO={}

for WpLGeq13=#eEP2FirJe_qemy-1,1,-1 do
  o8_24LEJ7=(o8_24LEJ7*1664525+1013904223)%4294967296
  local WbmB9awCba=o8_24LEJ7%(WpLGeq13+1)+1
  MPnPDNrWHDO[#MPnPDNrWHDO+1]={WpLGeq13+1,WbmB9awCba}
end
for S3rH9bGHT=#MPnPDNrWHDO,1,-1 do
  m4JJt4=MPnPDNrWHDO[S3rH9bGHT]
  local KfrLUxS=eEP2FirJe_qemy[m4JJt4[1]]
  eEP2FirJe_qemy[m4JJt4[1]]=eEP2FirJe_qemy[m4JJt4[2]]
  eEP2FirJe_qemy[m4JJt4[2]]=KfrLUxS

local uvims4H54Tb8LPEU={}
for S3rH9bGHT=1,#eEP2FirJe_qemy do
  uvims4H54Tb8LPEU[S3rH9bGHT]=string.char(bit32.bxor(eEP2FirJe_qemy[S3rH9bGHT],C8osktBrtFbpcYkw[(S3rH9bGHT-1)%#C8osktBrtFbpcYkw+1]))
